text: Surrounded by sleek glass walls and the hum of technology, I feel as though I have entered a portal of transition—a place between worlds, both physical and intellectual. The echo of repeated words, 'and and and,' reverberates like the infinite possibilities in research and development. In this space, curiosity merges with the promise of discovery. I am alert, intrigued, and strangely at home in the midst of evolving ideas.
